login.title: LLM Benchmark
login.subtitle: Enter your username and password to sign in
login.oauth_failed_desc: An error occurred during OAuth2/OIDC sign-in.
login.powered_by: Enterprise Evaluation Platform powered by EvalScope

admin.title: Platform Settings
admin.desc: Manage platform user accounts, teams and member permissions.

teams.confirm_delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this team? This action cannot be undone.

webhook.title: Webhook Notifications
webhook.desc: Send HTTP POST requests to configured URLs on task status changes (HMAC-SHA256 signed).
webhook.empty: No webhooks configured. Click the button above to add one.
webhook.form_secret_placeholder_set: Configured; leave blank to keep unchanged
webhook.form_secret_hint: If set, the X-Signature: sha256=<hmac> header will be included.
webhook.delete_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this webhook? This cannot be undone.

ldap.title: LDAP Sign-in
ldap.desc: Settings are stored in the database and editable by super admins only. Bind passwords are never returned by the API.
ldap.enabled_hint: When enabled, users (except the built-in admin account) can sign in with LDAP credentials.
ldap.always_update_user_hint: Refresh local user fields after each successful LDAP login.
ldap.bind_password_placeholder_set: Configured; leave blank to keep unchanged
ldap.bind_password_hint: Required only when the server disallows anonymous search. Never shown after save.
ldap.attr_map_invalid: Attribute map must be a valid JSON object

oauth.title: Single Sign-On
oauth.desc: Configure authorization-code sign-in. Client secrets are never returned by the API.
oauth.enabled_hint: When enabled, the login page shows an SSO button.
oauth.mode_oauth2_hint: Retrieves user identity via the UserInfo endpoint after exchanging the authorization code. No id_token issued or verified. Use for providers that only expose access_token + userinfo.
oauth.mode_oidc_hint: Adds an id_token (JWT) on top of OAuth2. Signature is verified with JWKS; iss, aud, and nonce are validated. Use for standards-compliant IdPs such as Keycloak, Azure AD, or Okta.
oauth.client_secret_placeholder_set: Configured; leave blank to keep unchanged
oauth.client_secret_hint: Never shown after save. Leave blank for public clients.
oauth.userinfo_endpoint_hint_oauth2: Required in OAuth2 mode — the sole source of user claims.
oauth.userinfo_endpoint_hint_oidc: Optional in OIDC mode — used to supplement claims not present in the id_token.
oauth.jwks_uri_hint: Required for OIDC — used to verify the id_token signature (e.g. https://idp.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json).
oauth.issuer_hint: Required for OIDC — validated against the iss claim in the id_token.
oauth.auto_create_users_hint: When disabled, only existing local users can sign in via SSO.
oauth.always_update_user_hint: Refresh local user fields after each successful sign-in.

dashboard.welcome_desc: This is a large model evaluation platform developed by the "Basic Technology Department - Security Group" utilizing the EvalScope engine. You can go to "Model Management" to configure API keys, or directly enter "Evaluation Tasks" to initiate new evaluation tasks.

models.title: Models
models.desc: Manage LLM endpoints and API configurations for your team.
models.empty: No models configured yet. Click 'Add Model' to get started.
models.delete_confirm_desc: This action cannot be undone. All model configuration will be permanently deleted.
models.dialog_desc: Add a new LLM endpoint for evaluation. Supports OpenAI-compatible and custom HTTP APIs.
models.test_req_url: API URL is required for testing
models.edit_desc: Modify model name, API configuration and connection details.
models.form_key_hint: Fill in to update key, otherwise leave empty
models.custom_body_template_hint: Variables: {{ prompt }}, {{ system_prompt }}, {{ user_prompt }}, {{ messages_json }}, {{ model }}, {{ max_tokens }}, {{ temperature }}, {{ top_p }}. Supports Jinja2 syntax e.g. {{ max_tokens | default(1024) }}
models.custom_response_path_hint: Dot-separated path to extract text from JSON response, supports array index e.g. outputs.0.text

datasets.title: Datasets
datasets.desc: Manage evaluation benchmarks. Use built-in ones or upload your custom data.
datasets.builtin_desc: Standard academic datasets natively supported by EvalScope.
datasets.custom_desc: Your team's uploaded proprietary evaluation data.
datasets.delete_confirm_desc: This action cannot be undone. The dataset file and all related evaluation records will be permanently deleted.
datasets.dialog_desc: Upload your own evaluation dataset. Supported formats: .jsonl, .csv, .tsv.
datasets.form_mapping_desc: Maps your fields to EvalScope format
datasets.val_err_file: Please select a dataset file to upload
datasets.val_err_json: Format mapping must be valid JSON
datasets.edit_dialog_desc: Modify dataset basic information and configuration
datasets.edit_mapping_desc: Maps your fields to EvalScope format

tasks.compare_desc: Compare evaluation scores across multiple tasks and datasets
tasks.desc: Run and monitor EvalScope evaluation jobs.
tasks.empty_hint: Click the button above to create your first evaluation task.
tasks.delete_confirm_desc: This action cannot be undone. All evaluation results and logs will be permanently deleted.
tasks.create_desc: Configure and start a new EvalScope job.
tasks.config_desc: Select the target model and benchmark datasets.
tasks.limit_desc: Number of samples to evaluate (for quick testing)
tasks.val_err_desc: Please select a model and at least one dataset
tasks.start_success_desc: Evaluation is now running in the background
tasks.rerun_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to re-run this evaluation task? Previous results will be preserved.
tasks.rerun_success_desc: Evaluation is now re-running in the background

results.title: Results & Arena
results.desc: Compare model performance across different benchmarks.
results.compare_desc: Select models to display in the arena
results.detail_desc: Deep analysis of single task evaluation result
results.table_samples_desc: Inputs, outputs and evaluation results for each sample
results.task_progress_desc: Read from progress.json in the task output directory (enable progress tracking when creating the task).
results.task_progress_waiting: Waiting for EvalScope to write the progress file…

landing.hero_badge: Enterprise LLM Evaluation Platform powered by EvalScope
landing.hero_subtitle: From model integration and dataset management to task orchestration and result analysis — a complete evaluation workflow to help your team select and validate large language models with confidence.
landing.new_subtitle: Continuous iteration to deliver more powerful evaluation and management capabilities.
landing.new_ab_compare_desc: Select 2–8 completed evaluation tasks to compare side by side. Radar charts show cross-dataset score differences at a glance, while category/dimension breakdowns and a sample agreement matrix make every performance change traceable.
landing.new_webhook_desc: Subscribe to task lifecycle events — started, completed, failed — and push them to any external system with HMAC-SHA256 signature verification. Configure multiple webhooks directly from the admin panel without touching code.
landing.new_sso_desc: Support for LDAP, OAuth2, and OIDC authentication, all managed centrally in the admin panel. No more hardcoded environment variables. API keys support a show/hide plaintext toggle for both security and usability.
landing.features_subtitle: End-to-end evaluation coverage — more efficient, more reliable.
landing.feat_multi_model_desc: Centrally manage OpenAI-compatible model APIs. Configure keys, endpoints, and parameters in one place.
landing.feat_custom_api_desc: Flexibly adapt non-standard APIs with a template engine. Custom request bodies, response parsing, and auth methods.
landing.feat_judge_eval_desc: Rule-based, LLM Judge, and hybrid strategies. Customizable scoring prompts and criteria.
landing.feat_custom_dataset_desc: Upload your own QA datasets in EvalScope-compatible format. Build domain-specific benchmarks.
landing.feat_sample_retry_desc: Retry individual samples, preserve full response history, switch between versions, and trace results.
landing.feat_ab_compare_desc: Multi-task side-by-side comparison with radar chart, category analysis, and sample flip matrix to quantify every iteration.
landing.feat_webhook_desc: Push task lifecycle events to external systems in real time. HMAC signature for security, configurable in the admin panel.
landing.feat_team_collab_desc: Role-based access control. Team members collaborate on evaluation tasks and share results.
landing.how_subtitle: A streamlined workflow from setup to analysis.
landing.step_1_desc: Configure model API endpoints and parameters. Standard and custom protocols supported.
landing.step_2_desc: Use built-in benchmarks or upload your own datasets. Mix and match as needed.
landing.step_3_desc: Configure strategy and Judge model, launch with one click. Async execution, no blocking.
landing.step_4_desc: Detailed scores, per-sample analysis, and multi-version A-B comparison to drive continuous model improvement.
landing.admin_desc: Consolidate all platform configuration into one management interface. Enterprise authentication, user management, and webhook integrations — sensitive credentials stay out of your code repository.
landing.admin_item_1: LDAP / OAuth2 / OIDC authentication with database-driven config that takes effect immediately
landing.admin_item_2: Multi-endpoint Webhook management with test dispatch and HMAC signature verification
landing.admin_item_3: User and team management with fine-grained role permissions
landing.admin_item_4: Secure API key storage with plaintext show/hide toggle
landing.admin_card_sso_desc: Centralized enterprise auth — LDAP, OAuth2, OIDC
landing.admin_card_webhook_desc: Real-time task event push with HMAC security
landing.engine_desc: EvalScope is Alibaba's open-source LLM evaluation framework with 100+ built-in benchmarks for multi-dimensional model assessment. This platform adds a full management UI and collaboration layer on top.
landing.cta_subtitle: Log in and experience the complete evaluation workflow — from model integration to result analysis.

compare.std_hint: Score standard deviation (spread of score distribution)
compare.no_breakdown: No category / dimension breakdown available for this dataset
compare.no_agreement: No shared questions across tasks, cannot compute agreement
